news_results.title: Walmart Connect Lowers Barrier to Entry with Self-Serve Expansion
news_results.snippet: Walmart Connect announced today that it is reducing the minimum monthly spend for its self-serve advertising platform from $50,000 to $5,000, opening the platform to thousands of mid-market brands.

news_results.title: Walmart Connect Opens API to Programmatic Buyers
news_results.snippet: Three major demand-side platforms have signed API partnership agreements with Walmart Connect, enabling programmatic buyers to access Walmart's proprietary shopper data for audience targeting.

news_results.title: Retail Media Networks: Walmart Connect Q1 2026 Preview
news_results.snippet: Industry analysts preview Walmart Connect's expected Q1 2026 performance as retail media spending continues to grow at 22% YoY.
